content.text:
Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: No changes needed - the existing `isAliveNextGen` logic `liveNeighbors === 3 || (liveNeighbors === 2 && livingCells.has(cell))` already correctly handles overpopulation. A living cell with 4 neighbors fails both conditions (4 != 3 and 4 != 2), so it dies.
**Result**: All 6 active tests pass (2 todo remaining)
**Approach**: The general rules-based implementation from prior Green/Refactor phases naturally handles the overpopulation case without requiring new code. This is minimal because no code was added.
